description: Calculator HTML layout, UI glue, and session history
intent: Build the HTML layout and JavaScript glue that connects the calculator engine to the DOM. Clicking buttons should update the display, pressing = should evaluate via calculator.js, and each evaluation should append to a visible history panel.
acceptance_checks: Clicking digit and operator buttons updates the display in real time
Pressing = evaluates the current expression and shows the result
A Clear button resets the display to empty
Each completed evaluation appears in the history panel (expression and result)
History is in-memory only (clears on page refresh, no localStorage)
Invalid expressions display an error in the result area without crashing the page or breaking the history panel
